mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_item_id, customer_id, business_id, content, image1) VALUES (#{orderItemId}, #{customerId}, #{businessId}, #{content}, #{image1, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT review_id, order_item_id, customer_id, business_id, content, created_at FROM review WHERE order_item_id = #{orderItemId} LIMIT 1
